title: Suspension of License due to Derogatory Record. The license of a
content: 6 single proprietorship, partnership or one-person corporation, shall be suspended, until 7 cleared by the Department, should any derogatory record as provided in these Rules be 8 found to exist against the single proprietor, any or all of the partners, or the one-person 9 corporation, as the case may be. 10 11 The acknowledgment or appointment of any officer or employee of any LMA may be 12 cancelled or revoked by the Department at any time, with due notice to the LMA 13 concerned, whenever said officer or employee is found to have any derogatory record. 14 15

metadata.source_file: [NOTICE TO PUBLIC] CLEAN DRAFT OF THE DMW SEABASED RULES.pdf
